title: Location Areas, Encounter Relations, Filtering, and Exploration · Language Lens: Pokedex Go Location Input
summary: Explore confuses locations with location areas, requests unbounded encounter data, prints duplicates, ignores empty relations, and loses which area produced each Pokemon. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go location input increment in provenance-preserving location encounter explorer. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
objectives: Validate numeric or canonical area identity, retain requested and resolved values, and construct only fixed-origin resource paths.
Distinguish region, location, and location-area resources and map the command to the endpoint whose relation answers the user need.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
